name: IM Report: Programme funding breakdown (per donor)

properties.sql: SELECT pf.id, pf.c_programme_code AS programme_code, COALESCE(reg.c_name, pf.c_programme_code) AS programme_name, pf.c_donor_code AS donor_code, COALESCE(d.c_name, pf.c_donor_code) AS donor_name, COALESCE(pf.c_share_percent,'?') || '%' AS share_pct_disp, COALESCE(pf.c_grant_reference,'') AS grant_reference, to_char(COALESCE(CAST(env.c_allocated_amount AS NUMERIC),0), 'FM999,999,999.00') AS envelope_alloc, to_char(COALESCE(CAST(env.c_allocated_amount AS NUMERIC),0) * CAST(NULLIF(pf.c_share_percent,'') AS NUMERIC) / 100.0, 'FM999,999,999.00') AS donor_allocated, to_char(COALESCE(proj.committed,0) * CAST(NULLIF(pf.c_share_percent,'') AS NUMERIC) / 100.0, 'FM999,999,999.00') AS donor_committed, to_char(COALESCE(proj.expensed,0) * CAST(NULLIF(pf.c_share_percent,'') AS NUMERIC) / 100.0, 'FM999,999,999.00') AS donor_expensed, to_char((COALESCE(CAST(env.c_allocated_amount AS NUMERIC),0) - COALESCE(proj.committed,0) - COALESCE(proj.expensed,0)) * CAST(NULLIF(pf.c_share_percent,'') AS NUMERIC) / 100.0, 'FM999,999,999.00') AS donor_remaining FROM app_fd_programme_funding pf LEFT JOIN app_fd_md_donor d ON d.c_code = pf.c_donor_code LEFT JOIN app_fd_mm_registration reg ON reg.c_code = pf.c_programme_code LEFT JOIN app_fd_budget_envelope env ON env.c_programme_code = pf.c_programme_code LEFT JOIN budget_projection proj ON proj.envelope_code = env.c_code ORDER BY pf.c_programme_code, CAST(NULLIF(pf.c_share_percent,'0') AS NUMERIC) DESC NULLS LAST
